content:textarea:4:86.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:4:86.html: Wake County is a wonderful place to live, work, and raise a family. Consistently ranked among the nation’s “Best Places for Business and Careers,” our community is thriving with growth and prosperity visible around nearly every corner.
content:textarea:4:86.content: Wake County is a wonderful place to live, work, and raise a family. Consistently ranked among the nation’s “Best Places for Business and Careers,” our community is thriving with growth and prosperity visible around nearly every corner.
content:textarea:4:86.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:24:99-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:5:63.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:5:63.html: But not everyone shares in that success.
content:textarea:5:63.content: But not everyone shares in that success.
content:textarea:5:63.newLoc: design:columns:1 column - 1 row my-3:24:99-1:1 column - 1 row:0

content:textarea:6:23.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:6:23.html: Every day, thousands of our neighbors — men, women, and children — face unimaginable challenges. They’re battling hunger. Struggling with mental illness. Fighting to break free from the grip of human trafficking. And as our population grows, so too does the need. A need that is quickly outpacing available resources.

content:textarea:7:95.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:7:95.html: Since 1887, The Salvation Army of Wake County has stood beside those in greatest need.

• Shelter for the homeless
  • Disaster relief for families in crisis
